rows.label: tlk70000013_05_msg0001
rows.name:
Did I just hear you say the name
"Macmac"? I've never met her, but
she sounds like a real character.

rows.label: tlk70000013_05_msg0002
rows.name:
Because Chairman Morumo got
spanked on the bottom like
a child!

rows.label: tlk70000013_05_msg0003
rows.name:
No idea how it happened. Not
sure I want to know, either...
Truth is I'm afraid to ask.
